overview.federal_law_status: No federal law; Salary Transparency Act pending in House since 2023

state_laws.requirement: Pay range in all job postings
Pay range in job postings; 2026 tightened to actual expected range
Pay range in external AND internal postings
Pay range in job postings; 2026 added temporary cure period
Pay range upon request or upon offer
Pay range upon request, at offer, or in posting
Pay range in job postings, external AND internal
Pay range in job postings; 2026 active enforcement with audits
Pay range in all job advertisements

state_laws.note: Focuses on earnings statements and deductions

state_laws.requirement: Pay range in job postings; 2026 active enforcement

categories_of_laws: Job advertisement disclosures (must include pay range in posting)
Disclosures upon request (must provide range when candidate asks)
Salary history ban (cannot ask about previous compensation)
pay_transparency_laws.remote_work_implications: If a role can be performed from a pay-transparency state, disclosure requirements apply regardless of employer HQ location
pay_transparency_laws.compliance_recommendation: Multi-state employers should adopt the most stringent requirement across all postings

job_advertising_rules: Illegal to show preference based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age (40+), disability, or genetic information
Ads seeking 'females' or 'recent college graduates' may violate law
AI-based ad targeting subject to same anti-discrimination rules

2026_enforcement_shift.disparate_impact_change: EEOC instructed field offices to close pending charges relying solely on disparate-impact theory (Oct 31, 2025)
2026_enforcement_shift.implication: Organizations must self-audit to ensure non-discriminatory practices
2026_enforcement_shift.national_origin_focus: Updated guidance on national origin discrimination in job advertisements

ai_in_hiring.california_ai_regulations: Final approval of regulations prohibiting discrimination in AI/automated decision systems
ai_in_hiring.eu_ai_act_note: Most AI tools used in employment classified as high-risk

gdpr_recruitment.scope: Applies to any organization processing EU resident data, regardless of company location
key_requirements: Explicit consent for talent pools / future roles
Delete or anonymize data 6-12 months after hiring process
Criminal record checks only if legally required
Cross-border transfers require Standard Contractual Clauses or Binding Corporate Rules

ai_recruitment_rules.automated_decision_making: Must be transparent and allow human intervention
ai_recruitment_rules.uk_duaa_2025: Eases restrictions on automated processing but requires safeguards and human oversight

other_key_regulations.description: Prohibits asking about criminal history on initial job application
Federal contractor affirmative action and non-discrimination requirements
other_key_regulations.applies_to: Federal contractors with $50,000+ contracts and 50+ employees

key_rules: Cannot ask about disability before offer
Must provide reasonable accommodations for application process
